strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and real-time systems
Proven track record of building and open-sourcing AI-adjacent platforms (e.g., GISCollective, MCP tooling)
Strong technical leadership through workshops, code kata, and mentoring across multiple organizations
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master's or PhD in AI-related field, limiting preferred qualification alignment
Limited evidence of direct AI/ML model development or deployment in production systems
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing roles in Germany-based cloud teams
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, diverse engineering experience with strong alignment to cloud and AI-adjacent infrastructure, demonstrated through hands-on contributions to agentic workflows and open-source platforms, alongside consistent technical leadership; however, the absence of formal AI credentials and explicit AI model development raises questions about depth in core AI strategy areas.
